name: Homer High School
description: Homer High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Homer, AK. There are 2 outdoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Homer Pickleball at the HERC
description: Homer Pickleball at the HERC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Homer, AK. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: Kachemak City Clerk
description: Kachemak City Clerk is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Homer, AK. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
hours: Open: Monday - Wednesday 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM, Thursday & Friday 9:00 AM - 1:00PM. Closed: Saturday, Sunday and most holidays. To report web related problems please contact cityclerk @kachemak.city Report abuse Page details Page updated Report abuse

name: Kenai Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kenai Municipal Park in Kenai, AK! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Kenai Recreation Center
description: Floors were recently redone. Staff will ask that you carry in clean court shoes and that you change into them before entering the court.
open_play_schedule: Schedule posted every monday on website, pickleball times static and rarely change.
fees: Fee required — $5 adult drop-in, $40 Gym Punch Card (10 drop-ins), $50 Gym Month Pass (30 Days)

name: Soldotna Field House
description: Soldotna Field House is a place to play pickleball in Soldotna, AK. There are 10 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: SPARC Homer
description: SPARC Homer is a place to play pickleball in Homer, AK. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Sterling Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Sterling Community Center in Sterling, AK! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
